settings.title: Shipping Info
settings.content: Orders ship within 1-2 business days. Free shipping on orders over $75. We ship via USPS Priority Mail and UPS Ground.

settings.title: Return Policy
settings.content: We accept returns within 14 days for unopened, factory-sealed products. Please contact us before sending a return.

settings.title: Authenticity
settings.content: All products are sourced directly from authorized distributors and are 100% authentic. We never sell resealed or tampered products.
